name: Super Admin
description: Full access to every enterprise module and system security.

name: Admin
description: Administrative control over operations, excluding system security and database actions.

name: Manager
description: Direct management of order dispatch, boutique catalog, inventory, and export reports.

name: Staff
description: Boutique logistics, tracking dispatch, and stock level checks.

name: Customer
description: Customer portal to view profile, checkout, track orders, and curate wishlists.
